task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded in Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data panel on the left side of the screen should display columns from the 'Sample Order Lines' (or 'sample_order_lines2023') dataset.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization type is set to Sankey Diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visualization canvas should display a Sankey diagram (nodes connected by flowing bands), or the visualization type icon in the grammar panel should indicate a Sankey chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the flow includes 'Order Priority', 'Ship Mode', and 'Customer Segment'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The grammar panel (e.g., Category, Source/Target, or Nodes) should list 'Order Priority', 'Ship Mode', and 'Customer Segment', and these should be visible as nodes in the Sankey diagram.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization is sized by 'Quantity'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The grammar panel's 'Size' or 'Value' section should contain 'Quantity' or 'Quantity Ordered'.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization title is 'Order Priority Flow Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Order Priority Flow Analysis' should be clearly visible as the title above the Sankey diagram on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'Logistics_Flow.dva' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application title bar should display 'Logistics_Flow', or a save dialog box should show the file being saved as 'Logistics_Flow.dva' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface being actively used (menus, drag-and-drop, panels), rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: Verify the Sankey diagram is rendered within the analytics software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart must appear inside the Oracle Analytics Desktop workspace, not as a static image opened in a web browser or photo viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just create a text file named .dva.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of a text editor (like Notepad) being used to create a dummy file named 'Logistics_Flow.dva'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected filename: Logistics_Flow.dva. Expected path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Logistics_Flow.dva. Chart type: sankey. Required dimensions: Order Priority, Ship Mode, Customer Segment. Required measure: Quantity (or Quantity Ordered). Title keyword: Flow Analysis.
